jackson.neighborhoods: Downtown, Fondren, Belhaven, South Jackson, West Jackson, North Jackson
jackson.meetingHighlights: State capital recovery with diverse meetings from Fondren to suburbs; strong African American community presence.
jackson.transitInfo: JATRAN bus service; Jackson-Medgar Wiley Evers International Airport (JAN); I-20 and I-55 hub.

gulfport.neighborhoods: Downtown Gulfport, Orange Grove, West Gulfport, North Gulfport
gulfport.meetingHighlights: Gulf Coast recovery serving Gulfport-Biloxi area; beach community meetings; strong resilience post-Hurricane Katrina.
gulfport.transitInfo: Coast Transit Authority buses; Gulfport-Biloxi International Airport (GPT); US Highway 90.

hattiesburg.neighborhoods: Downtown Hattiesburg, USM campus area, Oak Grove, Petal
hattiesburg.meetingHighlights: College-town recovery near University of Southern Mississippi; Hub City meetings; young people and family groups.
hattiesburg.transitInfo: Hub City Transit buses; Hattiesburg-Laurel Regional Airport (PIB); I-59 corridor.

tupelo.areaDescription: Tupelo and Lee County in northeast Mississippi
tupelo.neighborhoods: Downtown Tupelo, North Gloster, South Tupelo, Saltillo, Plantersville, Natchez Trace corridor
tupelo.meetingHighlights: Northeast Mississippi recovery hub with meetings in downtown churches and along North Gloster Street; birthplace of Elvis with a welcoming small-city fellowship; strong evening speaker and discussion groups.
tupelo.transitInfo: TRAMS dial-a-ride service; Tupelo Regional Airport (TUP); Natchez Trace Parkway and US-78/US-45 provide regional access.

meridian.areaDescription: Meridian and Lauderdale County in east-central Mississippi
meridian.neighborhoods: Downtown Meridian, Highland Park, Poplar Springs, North Hills, Bonita
meridian.meetingHighlights: East Mississippi recovery community with meetings near the historic downtown railroad district; evening and weekend groups at churches and community centers; regional hub serving surrounding rural counties.
meridian.transitInfo: Meridian Transit System provides local bus service; Key Field (MEI); I-20 and I-59 interchange provides major highway access.

biloxi.areaDescription: Mississippi Gulf Coast city in Harrison County
biloxi.neighborhoods: Downtown, Back Bay, Point Cadet, West Biloxi, Woolmarket, Beach Boulevard corridor
biloxi.meetingHighlights: Meetings serve the central Gulf Coast with regular attendance from Biloxi and nearby coastal communities.
biloxi.transitInfo: Coast Transit Authority buses, I-10, and Gulfport-Biloxi International Airport support regional access.

southaven.areaDescription: DeSoto County suburb in the Memphis metropolitan area
southaven.neighborhoods: Towne Center, Snowden Grove area, Greenbrook, Southcrest, Church Road corridor, Stateline Road area
southaven.meetingHighlights: Meetings serve the fast-growing north Mississippi suburbs with easy access from the Memphis area.
southaven.transitInfo: Primarily car-oriented via I-55 and Goodman Road; Memphis International Airport is nearby.

oxford.areaDescription: College town in north Mississippi and seat of Lafayette County
oxford.neighborhoods: Downtown Square, University of Mississippi area, Grand Oaks, Jackson Avenue corridor, Avent Acres, East Oxford
oxford.meetingHighlights: Meetings serve local residents and the university community with a steady weekly schedule.
oxford.transitInfo: Oxford-University Transit serves the city; most regional travel is by car via MS-6 and US-278.
